message:
feat(fsqlite-btree): expand balance_nonroot with parent_is_root parameter and improve cell distribution safety

- Add parent_is_root parameter to balance_nonroot() for root-aware rebalancing
- Add oversized cell guard in compute_distribution() to return DatabaseCorrupt
  error when a single cell exceeds usable page space
- Propagate parent_is_root through redistribute_cells() call chain
- Minor cursor navigation additions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
